title: Border router: RPL root and application gateways
description: Build border-router root functions for local LICHEN meshes: accept DAOs for native per-node /128s, install host routes, source-route downward traffic, and expose Resource Directory/time/application gateway services. Baseline nodes receive no ULA/GUA prefix and non-local native forwarding is disabled. Identity-preserving global Yggdrasil routing is owned by project-LICHEN-zt3c and blocked on its transport design.
notes: Current addressing model supersedes all earlier ULA, DHCPv6-PD-to-node, NAT64, and transparent Internet forwarding text. Conventional upstream connectivity belongs to gateway-hosted application proxies, not node address assignment.
